name: straddle-pp-mcp
description: Straddle API surface as MCP tools.

straddle_api_key.title: STRADDLE_API_KEY
straddle_api_key.description: Sets STRADDLE_API_KEY for the Straddle MCP server. Get a credential from https://run.pstmn.io/button.svg.

straddle_environment.title: STRADDLE_ENVIRONMENT
straddle_environment.description: Sets STRADDLE_ENVIRONMENT for the endpoint template variable {environment}.
